description: The first intervals.icu CLI with a local training database — offline search, SQL, and fitness/form analytics no other tool has.

tools.name: activity_delete
tools.description: Delete an activity. Required: id. Returns the ActivityId. Destructive.

tools.name: activity_get
tools.description: An empty stub object is returned for Strava activities. Required: id. Optional: intervals.

tools.name: activity_update
tools.description: Strava activities cannot be updated. Required: id. Optional: analysis_issues, analyzed, athlete_max_hr (plus 171 more). Returns the updated Activity.

tools.name: activity_best-efforts_find
tools.description: One of duration or distance is required. Required: id, stream. Optional: duration, distance, count (default: 8) (plus 4 more). Returns array of Effort.

params.name: duration
params.description: Duration of each effort in seconds

params.name: distance
params.description: Distance of each effort in meters

params.name: minValue
params.description: Minimum average value for each interval, intervals will expand if specified

params.name: excludeIntervals
params.description: If true portions of the stream that are included in work intervals are not considered

params.name: startIndex
params.description: First point in stream to consider

params.name: endIndex
params.description: Last point in stream to consider (exclusive, default is whole stream)

tools.name: activity_delete-intervals_delete_intervals
tools.description: Delete intervals. Required: id. Returns the updated IntervalsDto.

tools.name: activity_file_download-activity
tools.description: Download original activity file, Strava activities not supported. Required: id.

tools.name: activity_fit-file_download-activity
tools.description: Download Intervals.icu generated activity fit file. Required: id. Optional: power (default: true), hr (default: true).

tools.name: activity_gap-histogram_get
tools.description: Get activity gradient adjusted pace histogram. Required: id. Returns array of Bucket.

tools.name: activity_gpx-file_download-activity
tools.description: Not supported for Strava activities and activities without GPS data. Required: id. Optional: power (default: true), hr (default: true).

tools.name: activity_hr-curve-ext_get-activity-hrcurve
tools.description: Get activity heart rate curve in JSON or CSV (use .csv ext) format. Required: id, ext. Returns the Hrcurve.

tools.name: activity_hr-histogram_get
tools.description: Get activity heart rate histogram. Required: id. Optional: bucketSize. Returns array of Bucket.

tools.name: activity_hr-load-model_get-hrtraining-load-model
tools.description: Get activity heart rate training load model. Required: id. Returns the HrloadModel.

tools.name: activity_interval-stats_get
tools.description: Return interval like stats for part of the activity. Required: id, start_index, end_index. Returns array of int.

tools.name: activity_intervals_get
tools.description: Get activity intervals. Required: id. Returns the IntervalsDto.

tools.name: activity_intervals_update
tools.description: Update intervals for an activity. Required: id. Optional: all (default: true). Returns the updated IntervalsDto.

params.name: all
params.description: Any existing intervals are replaced, otherwise a merge is done

tools.name: activity_intervals_update-activity
tools.description: Update/create an interval. Required: id, intervalId. Optional: average_cadence, average_dfa_a1, average_epoc (plus 72 more). Returns the updated IntervalsDto.

tools.name: activity_map_get-activity
tools.description: Get activity map data. Required: id. Optional: bounds, boundsOnly (default: false), weather (default: false). Returns the MapData.

params.name: bounds
params.description: Optional comma separated bounding box (left, top, right, bottom) to limit points returned

params.name: boundsOnly
params.description: Only return the map bounds, not the latlngs

tools.name: activity_messages_list-activity
tools.description: List all messages (comments) for the activity. Required: id. Optional: sinceId, limit (default: 100). Returns array of Message.

tools.name: activity_messages_send-activity
tools.description: Add a message (comment) to an activity. Required: id. Optional: content. Returns the new NewMsg.

tools.name: activity_pace-curve-ext_get-activity-pace-curve
tools.description: Get activity pace curve in JSON or CSV (use .csv ext) format. Required: id, ext. Optional: gap (default: false). Returns the PaceCurve.

tools.name: activity_pace-histogram_get
tools.description: Get activity pace histogram. Required: id. Returns array of Bucket.

tools.name: activity_power-curve-ext_get-activity-power-curve
tools.description: Get activity power curve in JSON or CSV (use .csv ext) format. Required: id, ext. Optional: fatigue. Returns the PowerCurve.

params.name: fatigue
params.description: Use kj0 or kj1 to get one of the athlete's predefined fatigued power curves

tools.name: activity_power-curves-ext_list-activity-power-curves-1
tools.description: Get activity power curves for one or more streams in JSON or CSV (use .csv ext) format. Required: id, ext. Optional: types, fatigue. Returns array of PowerCurve.

params.name: types
params.description: Comma separated list of streams required (default is watts)

params.name: fatigue
params.description: Comma separated list of normal, kj0 or kj1 to return normal and/or fatigued curves

tools.name: activity_power-histogram_get
tools.description: Get activity power histogram. Required: id. Optional: bucketSize. Returns array of Bucket.

tools.name: activity_power-spike-model_get-activity
tools.description: Get activity power spike detection model. Required: id. Returns array of int.

tools.name: activity_power-vs-hr-ext_get-power-vs-hr
tools.description: Get activity power vs heart rate data in JSON or CSV (use .csv ext) format. Required: id, ext. Returns the PowerVsHrplot.

tools.name: activity_segments_get-activity
tools.description: Get activity segments. Required: id. Returns array of IcuSegment.

tools.name: activity_split-interval_split_interval
tools.description: Split an interval. Required: id, splitAt. Returns the updated IntervalsDto.

tools.name: activity_streams_update-activity
tools.description: Update streams for the activity from JSON. Required: id. Returns the updated UpdateStreamsResult.

tools.name: activity_streams-csv_upload-activity
tools.description: Column headers for streams to be updated must match those returned from the /streams.csv endpoint. Required: id, file. Returns the updated UpdateStreamsResult.

tools.name: activity_streams-ext_get-activity-streams
tools.description: Note that this endpoint will return 'fixed_watts' as 'watts'. If 'raw_watts' is asked for or types is null then the 'watts' stream is renamed to 'raw_watts'. If ext is .csv then CSV data is returned instead of JSON. Required: id, ext. Optional: types, includeDefaults (default: false). Returns array of ActivityStream.

params.name: includeDefaults
params.description: Include default streams in addition to any specified in types

tools.name: activity_time-at-hr_get
tools.description: Get activity time at heart rate data. Required: id. Returns the Plot.

tools.name: activity_tombstone_delete
tools.description: Delete an activity tombstone. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: activity_weather-summary_get-activity
tools.description: Get activity weather summary information. Required: id. Optional: start_index (default: 0), end_index (default: 0), descr_config. Returns the ActivityWeatherSummary.

params.name: start_index
params.description: Optional index of first point in activity to use

params.name: end_index
params.description: Optional index of last point in activity to use (exclusive)

params.name: descr_config
params.description: Optional JSON-encoded configuration for description field

tools.name: athlete_get
tools.description: Get the athlete with sportSettings and custom_items. Required: id. Returns the WithSportSettings.

tools.name: athlete_update
tools.description: Update an athlete. Required: id. Optional: activity_rpe_prompt, add_weather_to_strava_descr, applyToAll (plus 157 more). Returns the updated Athlete.

params.name: include_descr_in_plan_for_week
params.description: Include descr in plan for week

tools.name: athlete_activities_create-manual-activity
tools.description: Create a manual activity. Required: id. Optional: analysis_issues, analyzed, athlete_max_hr (plus 171 more). Returns the new Activity.

tools.name: athlete_activities_create-multiple-manual
tools.description: Existing activities with matching external_id, created by the same OAuth application are updated. Activities created/updated are returned. Activities with no external_id are always created. Required: id. Returns array of Activity.

tools.name: athlete_activities_get
tools.description: Fetch multiple activities by id. Missing activities are ignored. Required: athleteId, ids. Optional: intervals. Returns array of Activity.

params.name: intervals
params.description: Include interval data (icu_intervals and icu_groups fields)

tools.name: athlete_activities_list
tools.description: An empty stub object is returned for Strava activities. Required: id, oldest. Optional: newest, route_id, limit (plus 1 more). Returns array of Activity.

params.name: oldest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time e.g. 2019-07-22T16:18:49 or 2019-07-22

params.name: newest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time, defaults to now

params.name: route_id
params.description: Only return activities on this route

params.name: limit
params.description: Return at most this many activities

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma separated list of field names to include in the returned objects (default is all), also excludes null values

tools.name: athlete_activities_search-for
tools.description: Search for activities by name or tag, returns summary info. Required: id, q. Optional: limit.

params.name: q
params.description: Search query, case insensitive name search or exact tag search if it starts with #

tools.name: athlete_activities_search-for-full
tools.description: Search for activities by name or tag, returns full activities. Required: id, q. Optional: limit.

params.name: q
params.description: Search query, case insensitive name search or exact tag search if it starts with #

tools.name: athlete_activities_search-for-intervals
tools.description: Find activities with intervals matching duration and intensity. Required: id, minSecs, maxSecs, minIntensity, maxIntensity. Optional: type, minReps (default: 1), maxReps (default: 999999) (plus 1 more). Returns array of Activity.

params.name: minReps
params.description: Min number of intervals that need to match

params.name: maxReps
params.description: Max number of intervals that need to match

tools.name: athlete_activities_upload-activity
tools.description: Use the 'file' form parameter to supply the uploaded file. Multisport files are split into multiple activities. Activities are de-duped using a hash of the file. Response code is 201 if at least one new activity was created and 200 otherwise (all dups). Required: id, file. Optional: name, description, device_name (plus 2 more). Returns array of ActivityId.

params.name: device_name
params.description: Device the activity was created on e.g. Garmin Edge 540

params.name: external_id
params.description: ID of the activity on the system it came from

tools.name: athlete_activities-around_list
tools.description: List activities before and after another activity in closest first order. Required: id, activity_id. Optional: route_id, limit (default: 30). Returns array of Activity.

params.name: activity_id
params.description: The activity at the center (not returned in the data set)

params.name: route_id
params.description: Only return activities on this route (activityId must have this route_id)

params.name: limit
params.description: Return at most this many activities (default 30)

tools.name: athlete_activities-csv_download-activities-as-csv
tools.description: Download activities as CSV. Required: id.

tools.name: athlete_activity-hr-curves-ext_list-activity-hrcurves
tools.description: Get best HR for a range of durations for matching activities in the date range. Required: id, ext, oldest, newest. Optional: filters, secs, type. Returns the ActivityHrcurvePayload.

params.name: oldest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time e.g. 2019-07-22T16:18:49 or 2019-07-22

params.name: newest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time (inclusive)

params.name: filters
params.description: Only return activities matching all the filters in this list

params.name: secs
params.description: Optional durations to return (default is all, in seconds comma separated)

tools.name: athlete_activity-pace-curves-ext_list-activity-pace-curves
tools.description: Get best pace for a range of distances for matching activities in the date range. Required: id, ext, oldest, newest. Optional: type, filters, distances (plus 1 more).

params.name: oldest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time e.g. 2019-07-22T16:18:49 or 2019-07-22

params.name: newest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time (inclusive)

params.name: filters
params.description: Only return activities matching all the filters in this list

tools.name: athlete_activity-power-curves-ext_list-activity-power-curves
tools.description: Get best power for a range of durations for matching activities in the date range. Required: id, ext, oldest, newest. Optional: filters, secs, type (plus 1 more). Returns the ActivityPowerCurvePayload.

params.name: oldest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time e.g. 2019-07-22T16:18:49 or 2019-07-22

params.name: newest
params.description: Local ISO-8601 date or date and time (inclusive)

params.name: filters
params.description: Only return activities matching all the filters in this list

params.name: secs
params.description: Optional durations to return (default is all, in seconds comma separated)

params.name: type
params.description: The sport (Ride, Run etc.). If filters is not provided or is blank or does not contain a type filter then activities for the types of the sport matching this parameter are included. Required if fatigue is used

params.name: fatigue
params.description: Use kj0 or kj1 to get one of the athlete's predefined fatigued power curves

tools.name: athlete_activity-tags_list-tags-2
tools.description: List all tags that have been applied to the athlete's activities. Required: id. Returns array of string.

tools.name: athlete_apply-plan-changes_apply-current-plan-changes
tools.description: Apply any changes from the athlete's current plan to the athlete's calendar. Required: id. Returns the updated ApplyPlanChangesApplyCurrentPlanChangesResponse.

tools.name: athlete_athlete-summary-ext_get-athlete-summary
tools.description: Note that when this endpoint is called with a bearer token then only the athlete the token is for is returned. Required: id, ext. Optional: start, end, tags. Returns array of SummaryWithCats.

params.name: start
params.description: Local date and optional time (ISO-8601) for oldest data to return, default is 6 days ago

params.name: end
params.description: Local date and optional time (ISO-8601) for newest data to return, default is today

params.name: tags
params.description: Optional list of athlete tags, only athletes with one of these tags are returned

tools.name: athlete_chats_list
tools.description: Only returns activity chats that have new_msg_count > 0 or that have been updated recently. Required: id.

tools.name: athlete_custom-item_create
tools.description: Create a custom item. Required: id. Optional: athlete_id, content, description (plus 12 more). Returns array of NewCustomItem.

tools.name: athlete_custom-item_delete
tools.description: Delete a custom item. Required: id, itemId. Destructive.

tools.name: athlete_custom-item_get
tools.description: Get a custom item. Required: id, itemId. Returns the CustomItem.

tools.name: athlete_custom-item_list
tools.description: List custom items (charts, custom fields etc.). Required: id. Returns array of CustomItem.

tools.name: athlete_custom-item_update
tools.description: Update a custom item. Required: id, itemId. Optional: athlete_id, content, description (plus 12 more). Returns the updated CustomItem.

tools.name: athlete_custom-item_update-image
tools.description: Upload a new image for a custom item as multipart/form-data. Required: id, itemId, file. Returns the new CustomItem.

tools.name: athlete_custom-item-indexes_update
tools.description: Re-order custom items. Required: id.

tools.name: athlete_download-fit-files_download-activity-fit-files
tools.description: Download zip of Intervals.icu generated activity fit files. Required: id, ids. Optional: power (default: true), hr (default: true).

tools.name: athlete_download-workout-ext_download-workout-for-athlete
tools.description: The athlete's settings are used to resolve power targets etc.. Note that the create workout endpoint can convert workouts and might be more convenient. Required: id, ext. Optional: athlete_id, attachments, carbs_per_hour (plus 25 more).

tools.name: athlete_duplicate-events_duplicate_events
tools.description: Duplicate one or more events (planned workouts, notes etc.) on the athlete's calendar. Required: id. Optional: eventIds, numCopies, weeksBetween. Returns array of Event.

tools.name: athlete_duplicate-workouts_duplicate_workouts
tools.description: Duplicate workouts on a plan. Required: id. Optional: numCopies, weeksBetween, workoutIds. Returns array of Workout.

tools.name: athlete_event-tags_list-tags-1
tools.description: List all tags that have been applied to events on the athlete's calendar. Required: id. Returns array of string.

tools.name: athlete_events_apply-plan
tools.description: Apply plan. Required: id. Optional: extra_workouts, folder_id, start_date_local. Returns the new EventsApplyPlanResponse.

tools.name: athlete_events_create
tools.description: This endpoint accepts workouts in native Intervals.icu format ('description' field) as well as zwo, mrc, erg and fit files (use 'file_contents' or 'file_contents_base64'). Required: id, upsertOnUid. Optional: athlete_cannot_edit, athlete_id, atl_days (plus 61 more). Returns the new Event.

params.name: upsertOnUid
params.description: Update event with matching uid instead of creating a new one

tools.name: athlete_events_create-multiple
tools.description: This endpoint accepts workouts in native Intervals.icu format ('description' field) as well as zwo, mrc, erg and fit files (use 'file_contents' or 'file_contents_base64'). Required: id, upsertOnUid, updatePlanApplied. Optional: upsert (default: false). Returns array of Event.

params.name: upsert
params.description: Update events with matching external_id and created by the same OAuth application instead of creating new ones

params.name: upsertOnUid
params.description: Update events with matching uid instead of creating new ones, ignored if upsert=true. For Events with category=TARGET existing matching targets for the date and type are updated

params.name: updatePlanApplied
params.description: Give all events created or updated the same new plan_applied date (now)

tools.name: athlete_events_delete
tools.description: Delete a range of events (planned workouts, notes etc.) from the athlete's calendar. Required: id, oldest, category. Optional: newest, createdById. Destructive.

params.name: oldest
params.description: Local date (ISO-8601) of oldest event to delete

params.name: newest
params.description: Local date (ISO-8601) of newest event to delete (inclusive, default is all future events)

params.name: createdById
params.description: If provided only events created by this athlete (created_by_id field) are deleted

params.name: category
params.description: Comma separated list of event categories to delete (e.g. WORKOUT)

tools.name: athlete_events_delete-athlete
tools.description: Delete an event (planned workout, notes etc.) from an athlete's calendar. Required: id, eventId. Optional: others, notBefore. Returns the EventsDeleteAthleteResponse. Destructive.

params.name: others
params.description: If true then other events added at the same time are also deleted

params.name: notBefore
params.description: Do not delete other events on the calendar before this local date (ISO-8601)

tools.name: athlete_events_delete-bulk
tools.description: Delete events by id or by external_id. If external_id is supplied then the event must have been created by the calling OAuth application. If both id and external_id are supplied then external_id is used. Events that do not exist are ignored. Required: id. Returns the updated DeleteEventsResponse.

tools.name: athlete_events_download-workout-1
tools.description: Download a planned workout in zwo, mrc, erg or fit format. Required: id, eventId, ext.

tools.name: athlete_events_mark-as-done
tools.description: Create a manual activity to match a planned workout. Required: id, eventId. Returns the new Activity.

tools.name: athlete_events_show
tools.description: Get an event (planned workout, note etc.). Required: id, eventId. Returns the Event.

tools.name: athlete_events_update
tools.description: Update all events for a date range at once. Only hide_from_athlete and athlete_cannot_edit can be updated. Required: id, oldest, newest. Optional: athlete_cannot_edit, athlete_id, atl_days (plus 57 more). Returns array of Event.

params.name: oldest
params.description: Local date (ISO-8601) of oldest event to update

params.name: newest
params.description: Local date (ISO-8601) of newest event to update (inclusive)

tools.name: athlete_events_update-athlete
tools.description: Update an event (planned workout, note etc.). Required: id, eventId. Optional: athlete_cannot_edit, athlete_id, atl_days (plus 61 more). Returns the updated Event.

tools.name: athlete_events-format_list-events
tools.description: List events (planned workouts, notes etc.) on the athlete's calendar, add .csv for CSV output. Required: id, format. Optional: oldest, newest, category (plus 8 more). Returns array of Event.

params.name: oldest
params.description: Local date (ISO-8601) for oldest event to return, default is today in the athletes timezone

params.name: newest
params.description: Local date (ISO-8601) for newest event to return (inclusive), default is oldest plus 6 days

params.name: category
params.description: Comma separated list of categories to filter for (e.g. WORKOUT,NOTES)

params.name: limit
params.description: Max number of events to return (default is all events)

params.name: ext
params.description: Convert workouts to this format (zwo, mrc, erg or fit) and add workout_filename and workout_file_base64 to workout object

params.name: powerRange
params.description: Percentage used to convert fixed power targets into a range for outdoor workouts only (default is 2.5 or whatever is configured in the Garmin box in /settings)

params.name: hrRange
params.description: Percentage used to convert fixed HR targets into a range (default is 1.5 or whatever is configured in the Garmin box in /settings)

params.name: paceRange
params.description: Percentage used to convert fixed pace targets into a range (default is 2.5 or whatever is configured in the Garmin box in /settings)

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale (en, es, de etc.) to use for workouts with steps in multiple languages

params.name: resolve
params.description: Resolve power, heart rate and pace targets to watts, bpm and m/s respectively

tools.name: athlete_fitness-model-events_list
tools.description: These have category FITNESS_DAYS (days for fitness and fatigue), SET_FITNESS (set starting fitness and fatigue) and SET_EFTP (set eFTP). Required: id. Returns array of Event.

tools.name: athlete_folders_create
tools.description: Create a new workout folder or plan. Required: id. Optional: activity_types, athlete_id, auto_rollout_day (plus 22 more). Returns the new Folder.

tools.name: athlete_folders_delete
tools.description: Delete a workout folder or plan including all workouts. Required: id, folderId. Returns the FoldersDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: athlete_folders_import-workout-file
tools.description: Create new workout from .zwo, .mrc, .erg or .fit file in a folder. Required: id, folderId, type, file. Optional: athleteId. Returns the new Workout.

tools.name: athlete_folders_list
tools.description: List all the athlete's folders, plans and workouts. Required: id. Returns array of Folder.

tools.name: athlete_folders_list-shared-with
tools.description: List athletes that the folder or plan has been shared with. Required: id, folderId. Returns array of SharedWith.

tools.name: athlete_folders_update
tools.description: Update a workout folder or plan. Required: id, folderId. Optional: activity_types, athlete_id, auto_rollout_day (plus 21 more). Returns the updated Folder.

tools.name: athlete_folders_update-plan-workouts
tools.description: Update a range of workouts on a plan. Currently only hide_from_athlete can be changed. Required: id, folderId, oldest, newest. Optional: athlete_id, attachments, carbs_per_hour (plus 25 more). Returns array of Workout.

tools.name: athlete_folders_update-shared-with
tools.description: Add/remove athletes from the share list for the folder. Required: id, folderId. Returns array of SharedWith.

tools.name: athlete_gear_calc-distance-etc
tools.description: Recalculate gear stats. Required: id, gearId. Returns the GearStats.

tools.name: athlete_gear_create
tools.description: Create a new gear or component. Required: id. Optional: activities, activity_filters, athlete_id (plus 12 more). Returns the new Gear.

tools.name: athlete_gear_create-reminder
tools.description: Create a new reminder. Required: id, gearId. Optional: activities, activities_used, days (plus 14 more). Returns the new Gear.

tools.name: athlete_gear_delete
tools.description: Delete a gear or component. Required: id, gearId. Destructive.

tools.name: athlete_gear_delete-reminder
tools.description: Delete a reminder. Required: id, gearId, reminderId. Returns the Gear. Destructive.

tools.name: athlete_gear_replace
tools.description: Retire a component and replace it with a copy with the same reminders etc. Required: id, gearId. Optional: activities, activity_filters, athlete_id (plus 12 more). Returns array of Gear.

tools.name: athlete_gear_update
tools.description: Update a gear or component. Required: id, gearId. Optional: activities, activity_filters, athlete_id (plus 12 more). Returns the updated Gear.

tools.name: athlete_gear_update-reminder
tools.description: Update a reminder. Required: id, gearId, reminderId, reset, snoozeDays. Optional: activities, activities_used, days (plus 14 more). Returns the updated Gear.

tools.name: athlete_gear-ext_list-gear
tools.description: List athlete gear (use .csv for CSV format). Required: id, ext. Returns array of Gear.

tools.name: athlete_groups_list
tools.description: List groups for the athlete in name order. Required: id. Returns array of Chat.

tools.name: athlete_hr-curves-ext_list-athlete-hrcurves
tools.description: Curves are specified as follows: 1y (past year), 2y (past 2 years) etc., 42d (past 42 days) etc., s0 (current season), s1 (previous season) etc., all (all time), r.2023-10-01.2023-10-31 (date range). If several of the f1, f2 and f3 filter parameters are specified then each curve is returned once for each filter, for comparing curves. Required: id, ext, f1, f2, f3. Optional: newest, curves, type (plus 3 more). Returns array of DataCurve.

params.name: curves
params.description: Comma separated list of curves to return (default last year)

params.name: filters
params.description: Only consider activities matching all the filters in this list

params.name: f1
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

params.name: f2
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

params.name: f3
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

tools.name: athlete_mmp-model_get-athlete
tools.description: Get the power model used to resolve %MMP steps in workouts for the athlete. Required: id, type. Returns array of int.

tools.name: athlete_pace-curves-ext_list-athlete-pace-curves
tools.description: Curves are specified as follows: 1y (past year), 2y (past 2 years) etc., 42d (past 42 days) etc., s0 (current season), s1 (previous season) etc., all (all time), r.2023-10-01.2023-10-31 (date range). If several of f1, f2 and f3 filter parameters are specified then each curve is returned once for each filter, for comparing curves. Required: id, ext, f1, f2, f3. Optional: newest, curves, type (plus 6 more). Returns array of DataCurve.

params.name: curves
params.description: Comma separated list of curves to return (default last year)

params.name: filters
params.description: Only consider activities matching all the filters in this list

params.name: f1
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

params.name: f2
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

params.name: f3
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

tools.name: athlete_power-curves-ext_list-athlete-power-curves
tools.description: Curves are specified as follows: 1y (past year), 2y (past 2 years) etc., 42d (past 42 days) etc., s0 (current season), s1 (previous season) etc., all (all time), r.2023-10-01.2023-10-31 (date range). Curves can also have a -kj0 or -kj1 suffix to return fatigued curves. If several of f1, f2 and f3 filter parameters are specified then each curve is returned once for each filter, for comparing curves. Required: id, ext, type, f1, f2, f3. Optional: newest, curves, includeRanks (default: false) (plus 4 more). Returns array of DataCurve.

params.name: curves
params.description: Comma separated list of curves to return (default last year)

params.name: filters
params.description: Only consider activities matching all the filters in this list

params.name: f1
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

params.name: f2
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

params.name: f3
params.description: If set each curve is returned with these filters applied to compare curves

tools.name: athlete_power-hr-curve_get-power-hrcurve
tools.description: Get the athlete's power vs heart rate curve for a date range. Required: id, start, end. Returns the PowerHrcurve.

tools.name: athlete_profile_get-athlete
tools.description: Get athlete profile info. Required: id. Returns the AthleteProfile.

tools.name: athlete_routes_check-merge
tools.description: Returned routes include path information. Required: id, route_id, other_id. Returns array of RoutesCheckMergeItem.

tools.name: athlete_routes_get-athlete
tools.description: Get a route for an athlete. Required: id, route_id. Optional: includePath (default: false). Returns the AthleteRoute.

params.name: includePath
params.description: Include latlngs for the route GPS path

tools.name: athlete_routes_list-athlete
tools.description: List routes for an athlete with activity counts. Required: id. Returns array of WithCount.

tools.name: athlete_routes_update-athlete
tools.description: Update a route for an athlete. Required: id, route_id. Optional: athlete_id, commute, description (plus 6 more). Returns the updated AthleteRoute.

tools.name: athlete_settings_get
tools.description: Get the athlete's settings for phone, tablet or desktop. Required: id, deviceClass. Returns the SettingsGetResponse.

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_apply-to-activities
tools.description: Apply sport settings to matching activities (updates zones), done asynchronously. Required: athleteId, id. Returns the updated SportSettingsApplyToActivitiesResponse.

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_create-settings
tools.description: Create settings for a sport with default values. Required: athleteId. Optional: activity_charts, activity_field_ids, after_kj0 (plus 58 more). Returns the new SportSettings.

params.name: keep_all_laps_for_power_intervals
params.description: Keep all laps for power intervals

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_delete-settings
tools.description: Delete sport settings. Required: athleteId, id. Returns the SportSettingsDeleteSettingsResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_get-settings-1
tools.description: Get sport settings by id or activity type e.g. Run, Ride etc. Required: athleteId, id. Returns the SportSettings.

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_list-matching-activities
tools.description: List activities matching the settings. Required: athleteId, id. Returns array of ActivityMini.

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_list-pace-distances-for-sport
tools.description: List pace curve distances and best effort defaults for the sport. Required: athleteId, id. Returns the PaceDistancesDto.

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_list-settings
tools.description: List sport settings for the athlete. Required: athleteId. Returns array of SportSettings.

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_update-settings
tools.description: Update sport settings by id or activity type e.g. Run, Ride etc. Required: athleteId, id, recalcHrZones. Optional: activity_charts, activity_field_ids, after_kj0 (plus 58 more). Returns the updated SportSettings.

params.name: keep_all_laps_for_power_intervals
params.description: Keep all laps for power intervals

tools.name: athlete_sport-settings_update-settings-multi
tools.description: Update multiple sport settings. Required: athleteId, recalcHrZones. Returns array of SportSettings.

tools.name: athlete_training-plan_get-athlete
tools.description: Get the athlete's training plan. Required: id. Returns the AthleteTrainingPlan.

tools.name: athlete_training-plan_update-athlete-plan
tools.description: Change the athlete's training plan. Required: id. Optional: id, training_plan_alias, training_plan_id (plus 1 more). Returns the updated AthleteTrainingPlan.

tools.name: athlete_weather-config_get
tools.description: Get the athlete's weather forecast configuration. Required: id. Returns array of Forecast.

tools.name: athlete_weather-config_update
tools.description: Update the athlete's weather forecast configuration. Required: id. Optional: forecasts. Returns array of Forecast.

tools.name: athlete_weather-forecast_get-forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast information. Required: id. Returns array of Forecast.

tools.name: athlete_wellness_get-record
tools.description: Get wellness record for date (local ISO-8601 day). Required: id, date. Returns array of SportInfo.

tools.name: athlete_wellness_update
tools.description: Update the wellness record for the date (ISO-8601). Required: id, date. Optional: abdomen, atl, atlLoad (plus 43 more). Returns array of SportInfo.

tools.name: athlete_wellness_update-1
tools.description: Update a wellness record, id is the day (ISO-8601). Required: id. Optional: abdomen, atl, atlLoad (plus 43 more). Returns array of SportInfo.

tools.name: athlete_wellness_upload
tools.description: Upload wellness records in CSV format as multipart/form-data. Required: id, file. Optional: ignoreMissingFields (default: false). Returns the new WellnessUploadResponse.

tools.name: athlete_wellness-bulk_update
tools.description: The id of each record is the day (ISO-8601). Only fields provided are changed. Required: id.

tools.name: athlete_wellness-ext_list-wellness-records
tools.description: List wellness records for date range (use .csv for CSV format). Required: id, ext. Optional: oldest, newest, cols (plus 1 more). Returns array of Wellness.

params.name: newest
params.description: Local date of newest record (ISO-8601), inclusive

params.name: cols
params.description: Comma separated list of column names to include in CSV (default is all)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma separated list of field names to include in the returned objects (default is all), also excludes null values

tools.name: athlete_workout-tags_list-tags
tools.description: List all tags that have been applied to workouts in the athlete's library. Required: id. Returns array of string.

tools.name: athlete_workouts_create
tools.description: This endpoint accepts workouts in native Intervals.icu format ('description' field) as well as zwo, mrc, erg and fit files (use 'file_contents' or 'file_contents_base64'). Required: id. Optional: athlete_id, attachments, carbs_per_hour (plus 28 more). Returns the new Workout.

tools.name: athlete_workouts_create-multiple
tools.description: Create multiple new workouts in a folder or plan in the athlete's workout library. Required: id. Returns array of Workout.

tools.name: athlete_workouts_delete
tools.description: Delete a workout (and optionally others added at the same time if the workout is on a plan). Required: id, workoutId. Optional: others. Returns array of int. Destructive.

tools.name: athlete_workouts_list
tools.description: List all the workouts in the athlete's library. Required: id. Returns array of Workout.

tools.name: athlete_workouts_show
tools.description: Get a workout. Required: id, workoutId. Returns the Workout.

tools.name: athlete_workouts_update
tools.description: Update a workout. Required: id, workoutId. Optional: athlete_id, attachments, carbs_per_hour (plus 28 more). Returns the updated Workout.

tools.name: athlete_workouts-zip_download-workouts
tools.description: Download one or more workouts from the athlete's calendar in a zip file. Required: id, ext, oldest, newest. Optional: powerRange, hrRange, paceRange (plus 1 more).

params.name: ext
params.description: Format: zwo, mrc, erg or fit

tools.name: athlete-plans_update
tools.description: Change training plans for a list of athletes. Returns the updated AthletePlansUpdateResponse.

tools.name: chats_send-message
tools.description: Returns the new message id. If a new chat was created then it is also returned. Optional: accept_coaching_group_id, activity, activity_id (plus 20 more).

tools.name: chats_show
tools.description: Get a chat by id. Required: id. Returns the Chat.

tools.name: chats_messages_delete
tools.description: Delete a message. Required: id, msgId. Returns the MessagesDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: chats_messages_list
tools.description: List messages for the chat, most recent first. Required: id. Optional: beforeId, limit. Returns array of Message.

params.name: beforeId
params.description: Only return messages older than this one

params.name: limit
params.description: Return up to this many messages (default 30, max 100)

tools.name: chats_messages_update
tools.description: Only the content or answer can be updated. Required: id, msgId. Optional: accept_coaching_group_id, activity, activity_id (plus 15 more). Returns the updated MessagesUpdateResponse.

tools.name: chats_messages_update-last-seen-id
tools.description: Update last seen message for the chat. Required: id, msgId. Returns the updated MessagesUpdateLastSeenIdResponse.

tools.name: disconnect-app_disconnect_app
tools.description: Disconnect the athlete from the app matching the bearer token. Destructive.

tools.name: download-workout-ext_download-workout
tools.description: The athlete to use is extracted from the bearer token and used to resolve power targets etc.. Note that the create workout endpoint can convert workouts and might be more convenient. Required: ext. Optional: athlete_id, attachments, carbs_per_hour (plus 25 more).

tools.name: pace-distances_list
tools.description: List pace curve distances. Returns the PaceDistancesDto.

tools.name: shared-event_get
tools.description: Get a shared event (e.g. race). Required: id. Returns the WithCourses.
